title: Implement dynamic pages UI
description: Create admin UI to manage dynamic pages and public routes to display them. Fix Vue Router warnings for /shipping, /about, /contacts, /faq, /returns, /privacy.
acceptance_criteria: Admin page for managing dynamic pages exists (create/edit with WYSIWYG editor)
Public pages /shipping, /about, /contacts, /faq, /returns, /privacy fetch data from API and render correctly
No Vue Router warnings for these paths
